scenes.speaker: Nguoi dan chuyen
scenes.text: Sau khi nuoc [[Au Lac]] mat, dat nuoc ta roi vao thoi ky [[Bac thuoc]] - bi cac [[trieu dai]] phuong Bac do ho hon 1000 nam.

scenes.speaker: Nguoi dan chuyen
scenes.text: Vao nam 40 sau Cong nguyen, hai chi em [[Trung Trac]] va [[Trung Nhi]] da dung len chong lai ach do ho cua nha [[Dong Han]].

scenes.speaker: Trung Trac
scenes.text: Quan [[Thi Sach]] - chong ta - da bi ten [[Thai thu]] To Dinh giet hai. Ta khong the ngoi yen nhin dan ta chiu kho!

scenes.speaker: Trung Nhi
scenes.text: Chi oi, dan ta da san sang! Cac [[lac tuong]] khap noi deu huong ung. Chung ta se gianh lai dat nuoc!

scenes.speaker: Nguoi dan chuyen
scenes.text: Hai Ba Trung phat dong [[khoi nghia]] tai cua song [[Hat Mon]] (nay thuoc Ha Noi). Hang van nguoi dan huong ung, trong do co nhieu nu tuong.

choices.text: Khoi nghia co nhung ai tham gia?
Ket qua khoi nghia the nao?

scenes.speaker: Nguoi dan chuyen
scenes.text: Ngoai Hai Ba Trung, con co nhieu nu tuong nhu ba [[Le Chan]], ba [[Thieu Hoa]]. Dieu dac biet la phu nu Viet Nam thoi do cung cam vu khi ra tran!

scenes.speaker: Nguoi dan chuyen
scenes.text: Cuoc khoi nghia thanh cong ruc ro! Chi trong thoi gian ngan, quan khoi nghia da chiem duoc 65 thanh tri, duoi duoc [[Thai thu]] To Dinh chay ve nuoc.

scenes.speaker: Nguoi dan chuyen
scenes.text: Trung Trac duoc ton lam vua, dat do o [[Me Linh]] (nay thuoc Ha Noi). Ba cai tri duoc khoang 3 nam (40-43 sau Cong nguyen).

scenes.speaker: Nguoi dan chuyen
scenes.text: Nam 42, nha Dong Han cu tuong [[Ma Vien]] dem dai quan sang dan ap. Hai Ba Trung chien dau anh dung nhung cuoi cung that bai nam 43.

scenes.speaker: Nguoi dan chuyen
scenes.text: Du that bai, Hai Ba Trung la bieu tuong cua tinh than [[bat khuat]] cua dan toc. Ngay mung 6 thang 2 am lich hang nam la ngay tuong nho Hai Ba Trung.

scenes.speaker: Nguoi dan chuyen
scenes.text: Cuoc khoi nghia Hai Ba Trung la cuoc khoi nghia dau tien chong [[Bac thuoc]], the hien y chi doc lap cua nguoi Viet. Hay thu suc nhe!

glossary.definition: Nuoc do An Duong Vuong lap nen, bi Trieu Da chiem nam 179 TCN.
Thoi ky Viet Nam bi cac trieu dai Trung Quoc do ho (179 TCN - 938 SCN), keo dai hon 1000 nam.
Mot dong ho cai tri mot quoc gia qua nhieu the he.
Chi ca trong Hai Ba Trung, nguoi lanh dao khoi nghia nam 40, sau lam vua.
Em gai Trung Trac, cung lanh dao khoi nghia chong Dong Han.
Trieu dai Trung Quoc do ho nuoc ta vao thoi diem Hai Ba Trung khoi nghia.
Chong ba Trung Trac, bi Thai thu To Dinh giet, la nguyen nhan truc tiep cua khoi nghia.
Chuc quan do nha Han cu sang cai tri vung dat Viet Nam.
Cac thu linh dia phuong cua nguoi Viet thoi Bac thuoc.
Cuoc noi day cua nhan dan chong lai che do ap buc.
Dia diem phat dong khoi nghia cua Hai Ba Trung, nay thuoc huyen Phuc Tho, Ha Noi.
Nu tuong noi tieng tham gia khoi nghia Hai Ba Trung, nguoi lap nen vung dat Hai Phong.
Mot trong nhung nu tuong tham gia khoi nghia Hai Ba Trung.
Kinh do cua nuoc ta duoi thoi Hai Ba Trung, nay thuoc Ha Noi.
Tuong nha Dong Han duoc cu sang dan ap khoi nghia Hai Ba Trung.
Khong chiu khuong phuc, khong chiu dau hang truoc ke thu.

minigames.title: Sap xep cac moc lich su thoi Hai Ba Trung

events.text: Hai Ba Trung khoi nghia tai Hat Mon
Trung Trac len lam vua, do o Me Linh
Ma Vien dan quan sang, khoi nghia that bai
